rankings.name: Gennadius

key_risks: First experience of Southwell Tapeta
Stepped up in weights

rankings.name: King Of York
key_positive_factors: Course specialist with multiple wins here
key_risks: Likely over-bet by the market as favorite
Carrying top weight in this class

rankings.name: Rising Force

Tactical speed should suit the track
key_risks: Step up to Class 5 handicap level
History of being slowly away from stalls

rankings.name: Camino Del Ray
key_risks: Wide draw may force a difficult trip
Often finds one too good at the finish

rankings.name: Age Of Baroque
key_risks: Long layoff since debut win
Unproven under pressure in a handicap

rankings.name: Ernies Valentine

key_risks: Form has been erratic over the last season
Requires a strong pace to aim at

rankings.name: Hachiman

key_risks: Poor strike rate

rankings.name: Soames Forsyte
key_risks: Disappointed last time out
OR may have caught up with him

rankings.name: Its Only Fun

rankings.name: Phaedra
key_risks: Completely outclassed on OR and form
